creator: rum1cro@yandex.ru
text:
Yes, I know regarding this issue ;(
Need to change options "single" to "radio", because "single" should have one selected option:
-OPTIONS_SINGLE=		VIDEO
-OPTIONS_SINGLE_VIDEO=	HTTP_MP4 HTTP_MP4_H264
+OPTIONS_RADIO=		VIDEO
+OPTIONS_RADIO_VIDEO=	HTTP_MP4 HTTP_MP4_H264

I'll push patch to nginx port.
